visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white sweatshirt with graphics, is seen in an indoor room with white cabinets. She appears extremely frustrated, punching the lid of a cup repeatedly. She then slams her hands on a laptop and frantically pulls open desk drawers, throwing items out in a chaotic manner. Large red animated characters burst onto the screen. (2) The scene cuts to the same woman now dressed in a light yellow button-up shirt with large colored polka dots. She stands in a bright studio-like setting with shelves of toys and figurines behind her. She gestures toward the camera while speaking. (3) She presents a large white tub of 'Matthew's Choice' yogurt. The shot transitions to a close-up of white yogurt being poured into a glass and topped with nuts. She is shown eating the yogurt with a spoon, smiling warmly with heart graphics floating around her head. (4) She holds up four small bottles of 'Yogurt To Go' with different colored contents. She is seen drinking from one of the bottles and inspecting them with interest. White and yellow text overlays appear across the screen explaining product benefits. (5) In the final phase, she stands behind a display of the yogurt products, smiling broadly. She points upward and then downward toward the screen edge, encouraging viewers to take action.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 煩. [Variety]: 躁. [Variety]: 氣. (2) [Subtitle]: 我不想上班. (3) [Subtitle]: 欸，你是老闆娘欸，能不上班嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 老闆娘能不能不上班嗎. (5) [Subtitle]: 嘿嘿，給你這個. (6) [Slogan]: 馬修嚴選 G+優格. (7) [Slogan]: 乾淨無污染的鮮乳 X 美味與機能兼具的乳酸菌. (8) [Slogan]: 口感細緻柔滑. (9) [Slogan]: 奶香味濃郁. (10) [Slogan]: 幸福感滿滿. (11) [Subtitle]: 心情就會比快順利來啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 除了優格還有這個. (13) [Slogan]: G+ 優格飲. (14) [Slogan]: 堅持用無農藥殘留的水果製成果醬. (15) [Subtitle]: 可以給小朋友當早餐或點心喝. (16) [Subtitle]: 方便隨時補充健康好菌. (17) [Subtitle]: 幫助消化. (18) [Subtitle]: 這個裡面有篩選. (19) [Slogan]: 每一百克含有. (20) [Slogan]: 100億以上活性乳酸菌. (21) [Subtitle]: 可以幫助消化排便順暢. (22) [Subtitle]: 最適合像我們這種. (23) [Subtitle]: 常熬夜的高壓族或是外食族. (24) [Subtitle]: 開工開學有G+優格跟優格飲一起. (25) [Slogan]: 事事順心!!. (26) [Subtitle]: 沒錯. (27) [Subtitle]: 快到我首頁. (28) [Subtitle]: 把團購優惠連結點起來. (29) [Subtitle]: 一起把健康帶回家!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character appearing in two different outfits.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, initially wearing a white oversized sweatshirt and later a yellow polka-dot shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor office or hobby room with white cabinets, a laptop, and shelves filled with various collectible toys and figurines.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Rapid percussive thudding sounds occur as a fist repeatedly strikes a surface, followed by the clatter of a laptop and the rhythmic sliding and slamming of wooden drawers. No music is present. (2) A female voice enters with high-pitched, frustrated whining, quickly transitioning to a more energetic and professional tone. A bright, upbeat pop BGM with clear guitar strumming and a steady drum beat begins. (3) The female narrator speaks with high clarity and fast speed, describing product features. The music maintains a constant volume as a subtle bed. A soft 'ding' or sparkle sound effect is heard during transition. (4) Narration continues with high emotional valence, focusing on the yogurt's benefits. The BGM remains upbeat. (5) The narrator delivers a final energetic call to action with a slightly rising intonation. The music reaches a conclusion and fades out cleanly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Problem/Frustration -> Solution Introduction -> Product Demonstration -> Educational/Benefit Evidence -> Final CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Matthew's Choice yogurt and yogurt drinks as a healthy, stress-relieving snack for busy professionals and students, highlighting its taste and high probiotic content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on displaying and describing the specific features and benefits of Matthew's Choice products with clear brand visibility and a call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a relatable 'stressed worker' persona to pivot into a product pitch, effectively using high-density text overlays and upbeat music to maintain engagement.
